description: An operation strategy or technique for content creation, publishing, or audience engagement on media platforms

name.description: Name of the method or strategy, e.g. 蹭热点法, 黄金3秒开头, 评论区互动技巧

strategy_type.description: Category of strategy: 运营策略 (operation), 排版技巧 (layout), 文案套路 (copywriting)

description.description: Detailed explanation of the method and how it works

steps.description: Step-by-step instructions for implementing the method

platform.description: Platform this method is primarily applicable to

effectiveness.description: Observed or expected effectiveness of the method, e.g. 高, 中, 低 or specific metrics
